name: Find the Source of Algae Bloom
description: Investigate green water with Dr. Maya, trace the irrigation channel upstream, and identify a possible runoff source.

steps.description: Notice the green water that suggests an algae bloom.
Ask Dr. Maya why too much algae can be a problem.
Find a fertilizer runoff source such as a farm edge or overwatered yard.
Report the source and suggest a solution that reduces runoff.

success_dialogue: That is ecosystem thinking. You followed the green water upstream and found a cause we can actually change.
reward_text: You earned 40 ZuzuBucks, 10 reputation, and the Ecosystem Protector badge.
